new_findings.pattern: I seem to have been charged for a product I didn't receive
new_findings.rationale: This specific phrasing about being charged for a non-received product does not appear in the real batch.

new_findings.rationale: This specific complaint about receiving a different product is not found in the real batch.

new_findings.rationale: This repetitive mention of multiple password reset attempts is not present in the real batch.
